storage_auth_failed: Storage authentication failed. Check the configured access credentials
storage_permission_denied: The storage backend denied this operation. Check its permissions
storage_misconfigured: The storage configuration is invalid or incomplete. Check the connection settings
storage_not_found: The target storage resource does not exist or has already been removed
storage_rate_limited: The storage backend is rate limiting requests. Try again shortly
storage_transient_failure: The storage backend is temporarily unavailable. Try again later
storage_precondition_failed: The storage operation precondition failed. Refresh and try again
storage_operation_unsupported: This storage backend does not support the requested operation
